title: Carrier India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Carrier India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Carrier India are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Carrier India:
Carrier India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Carrier India!
